notes:
# Keen 0.13.0 — Tag system simplification + reliability fixes

Joint release across `keen-frontend`, `keen-backend`, and `keen-releases` 0.13.0. Built on the migration that retires the denormalized `tags` columns and makes `entity_tags` the single source of truth for tag associations across tasks, projects, milestones, knowledge items, and context logs. The visible user-facing impact is faster, more reliable tag editing — particularly the elimination of the "Failed to update task / project" toast cascade that had been hitting Tasks and Projects after tag changes.

## Highlights

### Reliability

- **Tag editing on tasks and projects now completes in milliseconds.** A long-standing cross-table self-deadlock between the tag-mutation flow and an inner column-sync UPDATE on a different connection had been timing out at the client's 30s ceiling and surfacing as "Failed to update task / project" toasts. The architecture has been simplified so the deadlock is impossible by construction — `entity_tags` is the single source of truth, with no parallel-column writes to race against. The matching frontend-side cache-cancellation cascade fix landed alongside.
- **Daily-log entries no longer lose accumulated tags on same-day append.** When a second log entry came in for the same source on the same day, the append branch was merging tag inputs against an empty list and effectively replacing instead of accumulating. Fixed.
- **Template-clone tags are preserved.** Cloning a tagged template Project, Milestone, or Task — directly or via the entity-template flow — now correctly carries tags through to the clone. Previously, tagged-template clones were emerging with empty tag arrays.
- **Agent chat sees task / knowledge-item tags again.** The agent's tool-calling responses for `getTask`, `searchKnowledge`, `getKnowledgeItem`, and `findRelevantKnowledge` were returning blank tag arrays after a recent refactor; the agent can again use tag information in its reasoning.

### Architecture

- **`entity_tags` is now the canonical tag-association table.** The denormalized `tags text[]` column on tasks, projects, milestones, knowledge items, and context logs has been retired. Search-index rebuilds are now driven by id-keyed helper functions fired from triggers on both the entity tables and `entity_tags` itself, with a new trigger on `tags(name)` so renaming a tag re-flushes the search index of every entity carrying it.

## Tier1 PR 5 deferred

The "drop `recovery_secret` from D1 + one-time recovery code in macOS Keychain" work originally intended for 0.13.0 has been deferred to a follow-up release; its three plan todos remain unstarted.

---

Full per-PR history: see [`keen-frontend/CHANGELOG.md`](https://github.com/saputello2/keen-frontend/blob/v0.13.0/CHANGELOG.md) and [`keen-backend/CHANGELOG.md`](https://github.com/saputello2/keen-backend/blob/v0.13.0/CHANGELOG.md).
